implementation_evidence.title: docs: refresh current SW-003 live gate status
implementation_evidence.self_review: PASS: docs-only diff; updates current SW-003 local live-gate status; no code path, no Miro access, no provider mutation, no Issue #8 closure, no live apply readiness.

metadata.outcome: README.md and docs/index.md now reflect the post-PR64 local SW-003 live-gate chain and preserve the non-closing, local-only, live-apply-blocked boundary.

title: Refresh current status docs
goal: Update Schauwerk docs so README/docs index reflect the post-PR64 SW-003 live-gate chain: evaluation receipt, status receipt, review packet, loaders, and the fact that Issue #8 remains open.

acceptance.assertion: docs/index.md and/or README summarize the current local SW-003 live-gate receipt chain through review-packet loading.
Docs explicitly state that the chain is local-only, non-closing, and does not enable live apply.
Schauwerk lint/tests relevant to docs/code status pass or unchanged docs are reviewed.
